title: penstemon × edithae
intro: Penstemon × edithae, also known as the hybrid beardtongue, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. Native to the southwestern United States, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Penstemon × edithae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
